scripts.build: bun run build:native && bun run build:wasm
scripts.release: bun run release:native && bun run release:wasm
scripts.dev: echo 'Use: bun run code:browser or bun run code:desktop' && exit 1
scripts.code:browser: bun run build:wasm && bun run --filter covalence-vscode code:browser
scripts.code:desktop: bun run build && bun run --filter covalence-vscode code:desktop
